collections.title: Must-Follow UX & Product Design Creators
collections.subtitle: Editorial Pick
collections.editorial: Great design doesn't happen by accident. These creators have shaped the way we think about user experience, accessibility, and product craft. Whether you're a seasoned designer or just getting started, their insights will change the way you build.

creators.name: Steve Krug
creators.title: Usability Expert & Author of "Don't Make Me Think"
creators.bio: Steve Krug is a usability consultant who has spent more than 25 years helping people understand how to design intuitive user experiences.

creators.name: Sara Soueidan
creators.title: Inclusive Design Engineer
creators.bio: An award-winning front-end engineer focused on accessibility and inclusive design, author, and speaker.

creators.name: Jony Ive
creators.title: Former Chief Design Officer at Apple
creators.bio: Sir Jonathan Ive is a British-American industrial and software designer, best known for his work at Apple.

collections.title: Top Tech Reviewers to Watch
collections.subtitle: Trending
collections.editorial: Stay ahead of the curve with the most trusted voices in tech. From deep-dive teardowns to first-look exclusives, these reviewers set the standard.

creators.name: Marques Brownlee
creators.title: Tech Reviewer & YouTuber
creators.bio: Known as MKBHD, Marques Brownlee produces high-quality tech reviews and has interviewed top industry leaders.

creators.name: Linus Sebastian
creators.title: Founder of Linus Tech Tips
creators.bio: Linus Sebastian is the founder of Linus Media Group and host of Linus Tech Tips, one of the most popular tech channels on YouTube.

creators.name: Marques Brownlee
creators.title: Tech Reviewer & YouTuber
creators.bio: Known as MKBHD, Marques Brownlee produces high-quality tech reviews and has interviewed top industry leaders.

creators.name: Jony Ive
creators.title: Former Chief Design Officer at Apple
creators.bio: Sir Jonathan Ive is a British-American industrial and software designer, best known for his work at Apple.
